data.title: Global report on Bismuth Methane Sulfonate (CAS 82617-81-0) forecasts market trends 2019-2024 and 2025-2029. Details on applications, manufacturing methods, patents, suppliers, prices, end-users.
data.description: A report on Bismuth Methane Sulfonate (CAS 82617-81-0) has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report provides detailed insights on the global and regional market trends spanning from 2019 to 2024, with forecasts up to 2029. It covers a wide range of information including general data, synonyms, chemical composition, safety measures, hazards, handling procedures, storage guidelines, as well as toxicological and ecological aspects related to Bismuth methane sulfonate. Additionally, the report offers transportation information. This comprehensive study provides valuable details for industry stakeholders.

data.title: Arch Biopartners appoints Dr. Patrick Vink as Chairman of the Board on Jan. 15, 2026. TSX Venture: ARCH, OTCQB: ACHFF.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Arch Biopartners Inc. revealed the selection of Dr. Patrick Vink as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors. The Company, known as Arch, operates under the tickers TSX Venture: ARCH and OTCQB: ACHFF. Dr. Vink officially assumed the role on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Meisha Lutsey appointed to INSA's Board of Directors by CACI International Inc, representing intelligence and national security.
data.description: CACI International Inc revealed today that Meisha Lutsey, the executive vice president of mission and engineering support at CACI, has been appointed to the Board of Directors of the Intelligence and National Security Alliance (INSA). INSA, representing the needs of the industrial base with the intelligence and national security communities, appointed Lutsey to the Board. Lutsey expressed her honor at being chosen for the role, highlighting the importance of INSA's work in aligning the industrial base's objectives. This development comes following the announcement made by CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI).

data.title: Kennedy Funding provides $2.1 million loan for synagogue in Ferndale, NY. Leading in nontraditional property funding.
data.description: A leading lender in New Jersey, Kennedy Funding, remains at the forefront of financing nontraditional properties. On January 16, 2026, the company sealed a deal for a $2.1 million working capital loan to NSB Estate, LLC. The loan was specifically aimed at supporting a recently built religious facility in Ferndale, showcasing Kennedy Funding's dedication to funding unique and diverse real estate projects.

data.title: AllyGPO and BioCareSD partner to serve Retina Associates of Cleveland, meeting market need for advanced options.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 16, 2026, AllyGPO® and BioCareSD® revealed a new strategic partnership designed to cater to community-based specialty practices. As part of this collaboration, Retina Associates of Cleveland, Inc (RACI) has opted for BioCareSD's specialty distribution services. This agreement signifies a significant move within the industry, underscoring the importance of effective partnerships to serve specialized medical facilities. This partnership aims to enhance services for community-based specialty practices, with RACI serving as a key player in this alliance.

data.title: Wabtec to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 11, 2026; conference call at 8:30am ET. Visit www.WabtecCorp.com for webcast.
data.description: Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) disclosed plans to release its Q4 2025 financial results on February 11, 2026, before U.S. markets open. Following this, the company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day for analysts and investors. To participate in the webcast, individuals can access the call on Wabtec’s website at www.WabtecCorp.com under the “Investor Relations” section. Those unable to join live can access an audio replay afterwards.

data.title: Keynote speaker Daymond John announced for Vertafore and NetVU's InsurTech event, Accelerate 2026. Includes AI focus.
data.description: The leading InsurTech conference for agencies, MGAs, and carriers is back with a spotlight on AI and fresh advancements, offering practical learning opportunities and fostering strong community bonds. The event will take place in Denver on January 16, 2026. Vertafore®, a frontrunner in insurance technology, together with the Network of Vertafore Users (NetVU), will be hosting this event to bring together industry professionals.

data.title: FedEx Corp announces 10-member board for future independent FedEx Freight, spin-off planned on June 1, 2026. Brad Martin to chair.
data.description: FedEx Corp. revealed the ten-member board of directors for FedEx Freight, in preparation for its upcoming spin-off from FedEx Corp. set for June 1, 2026. R. Brad Martin, the current executive chairman of FedEx Corp. board, will lead as the chairman of the board of FedEx Freight. John Smith, the incoming president and CEO of FedEx Freight, will join as a director, alongside eight other seasoned professionals. The board appointments indicate strategic steps in the spin-off process of FedEx Freight and represent a significant move in the company's restructuring plans.

data.title: KNIME appoints Trevor Kaufman as CEO as founder steps down. Company transitions into next phase of growth.
data.description: In Zurich, it was reported that Michael Berthold, the Founder and CEO of KNIME, will be resigning from his position. Stepping into his role is Trevor Kaufman, an experienced CEO known for successfully expanding high-growth SaaS companies. The transition aims to guide KNIME into its next stage of development. Berthold reflected on the evolution of KNIME, from the concept of making data science accessible to establishing a popular product, garnering hundreds of thousands of users, and building a strong team.

data.title: Sunstone Hotel Investors to release Q4 & full year 2025 earnings on Feb 27, 2026. Trading as SHO on NYSE.
data.description: Aliso Viejo, California - Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. (NYSE: SHO) disclosed plans to release their financial performance for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 on February 27, 2026, prior to market opening. The organization, commonly referred to as Sunstone, stated that their management team will host the announcement.

data.title: EHang appoints Shuai Feng as CTO to enhance innovation; effective Jan. 14, 2026. A key step in advancing tech management.
data.description: EHang Holdings Limited, a prominent player in advanced air mobility technology, recently disclosed the appointment of Mr. Shuai Feng as the Chief Technology Officer, effective since January 14, 2026. This strategic move was approved by the Board of Directors, signifying a significant step in the Company's technology roadmap. Under the guidance of Founder, Chairman, and CEO Mr. Huazhi Hu, EHang has fostered a strong technological base over the years. The ascension of Mr. Feng is expected to further bolster the Company's technology management approach, emphasizing innovation and practical application in the industry.

data.title: Vivos Therapeutics reveals exercise of warrants, bringing in $4.64M in gross proceeds.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking a significant improvement from the contraction of 3.5% seen in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The growth is attributed to the increasing vaccinations rates and government stimulus packages. However, the recovery is uneven across regions, with advanced economies projected to grow by 5.4% while emerging and developing economies are expected to expand by 6%. Inflation rates are also anticipated to rise in several countries, with the United States experiencing the highest forecasted inflation rate of 3.5%. The report emphasizes the importance of continued support from governments and central banks to ensure a stable and inclusive recovery.

data.title: Tembo partners with HMBEV in $11B Australian utility truck market to boost sales, aiming for $838M spin-off.
data.description: The goal of the partnership is to boost market acceptance and sales in the crucial Australian market, as Tembo advances towards its potential spin-off valued at US$838 million through a public listing.

data.title: RNWF and Kepler Fusion Tech reveal white paper on Texatron™ Aneutronic Fusion Platform, outlining architecture and commercialization.
data.description: Last weekend, a major fire broke out in a commercial building in downtown causing extensive damage. The incident occurred on Saturday evening around 8 p.m. and took several hours for firefighters to bring it under control. Approximately 50 firefighters were at the scene, trying to extinguish the blaze that engulfed multiple floors of the structure. Thankfully, no injuries were reported, but the building suffered significant structural damage. The cause of the fire is still under investigation, and the estimated cost of the damage is around $1 million. The local authorities are urging nearby residents and businesses to remain cautious as investigations continue and cleanup efforts get underway.

data.title: AutoNation will release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb. 6, 2026, before the market opens. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET. Phone: 833-470-1428.
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. stated that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 6, 2026, prior to the market's opening. The management intends to address these results and provide additional details about the company in a conference call and audio webcast on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can join the conference call via telephone at 833-470-1428 (Conference ID: 817116).

data.title: Lyten introduces new concrete admixture for infrastructure, promising strength and durability without production changes or cost increase.
data.description: A company named Lyten, known for its invention of Lyten 3D Graphene™, has revealed its move into the worldwide concrete industry. The launch of their new product, Lyten S Cure™, marks their entry into the market. Lyten S Cure™ is a concrete admixture specifically designed to enhance the strength, durability, and speed of infrastructure construction. What sets this product apart is that it achieves these improvements without the need for alterations to current production methods or an increase in expenses. This new development represents Lyten's expansion into its third significant industrial sector, showcasing its unique supermaterial technology.
